headingScale.text: Creative Destruction Lab (CDL) is a nonprofit organization that delivers an objectives-based program for massively scalable, seed-stage, science- and technology
Our mentors share founders’ ambition. They’ve pushed the boundaries of what’s possible in their own businesses.

links.text: Unlocking Enterprise Productivity Through AI: CDL’s Putting AI to Work Program

sections.label: Creative Destruction Lab (CDL) is a nonprofit organization that delivers an objectives-based program for massively scalable, seed-stage, science- and technology-based companies.
sections.text: Creative Destruction Lab (CDL) is a nonprofit organization that delivers an objectives-based program for massively scalable, seed-stage, science- and technology-based companies.

sections.label: Our mentors share founders’ ambition. They’ve pushed the boundaries of what’s possible in their own businesses.
sections.text: Our mentors share founders’ ambition. They’ve pushed the boundaries of what’s possible in their own businesses. “Why do we do CDL? For me, it’s to improve our quality of life. ‘Build Something Massive’ does not just mean profit. These technologies are important for trying to build a sustainable world.” Chris Hadfield Former Commander of the International Space Station See all Mentors ›

sections.label: “Why do we do CDL? For me, it’s to improve our quality of life. ‘Build Something Massive’ does not just mean profit. These technologies are important for trying to build a sustaina
sections.text: “Why do we do CDL? For me, it’s to improve our quality of life. ‘Build Something Massive’ does not just mean profit. These technologies are important for trying to build a sustainable world.” Chris Hadfield Former Commander of the International Space Station See all Mentors ›

sections.label: CDL operates 23 streams
sections.text: CDL operates 23 streams Advanced Therapies AgriFood Artificial Intelligence Biomedical Engineering Cancer Climate Computational Health Compute Digital Society Energy Health Health & Wellness Manufacturing Minerals Neuro Next Gen Computing Oceans Prime Quantum Risk Space Supply Chain Web3

sections.label: 16 locations globally
sections.text: 16 locations globally Founded at the Rotman School of Management at the University of Toronto in 2012, CDL now operates five sites in Canada, three in the United States, six in Europe, one in Australia, and one in Asia. All locations ›

sections.label: From the blog
sections.text: From the blog Announcements Creative Destruction Lab Connects Entrepreneurs to Global Network with CDL-Doha With funding from the Qatar Investment Authority and the Qatar Research, Development, and Innovation Council, CDL-Doha will advance research-driven entrepreneurship and strengthen Qatar’s role in the global innovation economy. Announcements Creative Destruction Lab partners with BIC Gipuzkoa and IESE Business School to launch CDL-San Sebastian in Spain CDL-San Sebastian will join the global CDL Quantum program, and launch a CDL AI stream focused on natural language processing and multilingual models to complement the arrival of the IBM System Two quantum computer and strengthen Gipuzkoa’s role as a growing hub for deep tech commercialization in Europe.

sections.label: Creative Destruction Lab Connects Entrepreneurs to Global Network with CDL-Doha
sections.text: Announcements Creative Destruction Lab Connects Entrepreneurs to Global Network with CDL-Doha With funding from the Qatar Investment Authority and the Qatar Research, Development, and Innovation Council, CDL-Doha will advance research-driven entrepreneurship and strengthen Qatar’s role in the global innovation economy.
